title: Peanut Butter, Apple and Cheddar Croissants Sammies with Granola.

ingredients.name: 6-12 tablespoons [Smucker's Organic Natural Chunky Peanut Butter | http://www.smuckersnaturalpeanutbutter.com/?utm_source=halfbakedharvest&utm_medium=blogpost&utm_campaign=mand]
2  honeycrisp or pink lady apples (thinly sliced)
peanut granola (for topping (recipe below this one))

steps.instruction: Spread the bottom of each croissant with apple butter and then spread 1 tablespoon peanut butter over the butter. Add a slice of cheddar cheese and a few thinly sliced apples. Sprinkle with granola.
Spread the remaining tablespoon of peanut butter on the top half of the croissant and place over the granola. Serve or wrap tightly in plastic wrap for up to 1 day.*
